column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `legal/eu/gdpr` extension <-> ISO/IEC 27701:2019 (Privacy Information Management) clause alignment. LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7) connecting GDPR Article references, lawful bases (A6-1-a … A6-1-f), special-category bases (A9-2-a …), accountability/transparency principles, data-subject rights (A13–A22), and breach-notification roles to ISO/IEC 27701 PII controller / processor clauses. Each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` per the Semantic Mapping Vocabulary and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`.
